Maun New Mall Service Station

Location
Maun, Botswana
Client
Pending confirmation
Completed
Pending confirmation
Services
Development Consultancy, Retail Planning, Town Planning
Overview

A service-station design proposal — approved

Martone was mandated to design a service station at Maun New Mall. The proposal was successfully approved — a result that depends on shaping a scheme that is not only workable on the ground but clear enough to move through statutory review without delay.

On a brief like this, design decisions and planning logic have to stay aligned from the outset. The site layout, access arrangements, and land-use context all feed directly into whether an approval can be secured and what conditions it comes with.
